title: [epic] RAK WisGate Developer gateway support
description: RAK WisGate Developer (RAK7268/RAK7289) as border router. Outdoor-ready enclosure, PoE, optional cellular. LoRaWAN-focused but runs OpenWrt - could run LICHEN. $150+. Pros: weatherproof, professional. Cons: pricey, may need firmware work to run mesh instead of LoRaWAN.
